src.app.about.AboutClient.l108.s1: Each payment is blocked in an escrow account until the order is completed.
src.app.about.AboutClient.l116.s1: We support BTC, ETH, LTC, XMR and USDT for fast and borderless transactions.

src.app.about.AboutClient.l65.s1: The next generation digital marketplace. Safe, private, efficient.
src.app.about.AboutClient.l91.s1: OpenlyMarket is a global platform dedicated to the exchange of digital goods and services. We were born with a clear mission: to create a secure trading environment where privacy comes first and trust is guaranteed by technology, not bureaucracy.
src.app.about.AboutClient.l94.s1: Unlike traditional marketplaces, we do not require invasive KYC procedures. We rely on reputation, security deposits (Vendor Bonds) and a rigorous Escrow system to protect every single transaction.

src.app.about.page.l105.s1: Buyers post specific requests ("I'm looking for X"). Sellers respond with tailor-made offers. This eliminates spam and ensures targeted deals.

src.app.become-escrow.page.l190.s1: OpenlyMarket allows experienced and trusted individuals to become Escrow Partners on the platform. As an escrow partner, you help secure transactions between buyers and sellers by holding funds in escrow until the deal is completed. In return, you earn a share of the escrow fee for every transaction you manage.

src.app.become-seller.page.l190.s1: To maintain a safe and trustworthy marketplace, all sellers must complete a verification process before they can post offers. Our system is designed to be
src.app.become-seller.page.l191.s1: : We do not require mandatory KYC. Instead, we use a model based on reputation, sales history and financial responsibility.
src.app.become-seller.page.l221.s1: Show that you have "skin in the game".
src.app.become-seller.page.l230.s1: We ask for evidence of your existing business reputation:
src.app.become-seller.page.l258.s1: For some categories or high volume sellers, a security deposit (Vendor Bond) is required. This serves to protect the marketplace from fraudulent behavior.
src.app.become-seller.page.l269.s1: To activate your seller account, you need to lock in a minimum amount of cryptocurrencies (USDT, BTC, XMR). This fund remains yours but is blocked as collateral.
src.app.become-seller.page.l277.s1: The value of the required bond increases proportionally to the volume of your sales. This mechanism serves to prevent "exit scams" when a seller accumulates large-value orders.
src.app.become-seller.page.l289.s1: The total value of your active orders cannot exceed a multiple of your bond. If you reach the limit, you must increase the bond or complete existing orders.
src.app.become-seller.page.l297.s1: In case of bad behavior, the bond can be confiscated to reimburse the damaged buyers.
src.app.become-seller.page.l309.s1: *Sellers with excellent reputation (100+ sales, 98% feedback) can obtain reductions in the required bond. Withdrawal of the bond is only possible without active orders and after a safety period.
src.app.become-seller.page.l324.s1: Each seller receives a dynamic score based on:
src.app.become-seller.page.l334.s1: The higher the score, the higher the visibility.

src.app.become-seller.page.l357.s1: Higher tiers = Lower commissions and priorities.

src.app.become-seller.page.l380.s1: When you publish a new service or offer, our system automatically sends an instant notification to all users who are looking for that type of service.
src.app.become-seller.page.l389.s1: If a buyer searches for a service you offer, you will be notified immediately with the request, allowing you to respond before your competition.
src.app.become-seller.page.l403.s1: Our goal is to create a secure environment without compromising privacy. We do not require mandatory KYC and use escrow to secure transactions.

Welcome to OpenlyMarket. Before using our services, please read the following disclaimer carefully.
OpenlyMarket operates exclusively as a technology intermediary. Our platform is a means that allows users to post advertisements for the sale of goods or services. We are not the owner, seller, or operator of the products or services offered in the listings.
No Responsibility for Contents and Transactions
We are not responsible for the activities carried out by users on the site. Each user is directly and solely responsible for their actions, information provided and obligations incurred.
We are not responsible for what users sell. The quality, safety, legality and truthfulness of the items or services offered are the sole responsibility of the user who publishes the advertisement. We do not carry out any prior checks on published content.
We are not a party to the transaction. Any agreement, transaction or contract entered into between users occurs directly between them. OpenlyMarket is not a party to this relationship and assumes no liability arising therefrom.
Your use of our platform constitutes your acceptance that all interactions and transactions are conducted at your own risk. We recommend users to take the necessary precautions and act with common sense when buying and selling.
By using OpenlyMarket, you accept the terms of this disclaimer and release the platform from any liability related to user activities and the contents of the advertisements.

src.app.faq.FAQClient.l102.s1: How much does it cost to sell on the platform?
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l103.s1: In addition to the entry fee ($20), the platform takes a small commission on each completed transaction. There are no fixed monthly costs unless you choose to promote your listings with the 'Sponsored Listings' plans.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l107.s1: You can increase your visibility by purchasing sponsorship packages (e.g. $25/month). Your offers will appear at the top of searches and in featured sections, increasing the chances of sales.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l110.s1: When do I receive my payments?
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l111.s1: Funds are released from the Escrow system to your wallet immediately after the buyer confirms receipt of the order or after the automatic release period if there are no disputes.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l151.s1: Everything you need to know to use OpenlyMarket to the fullest.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l70.s1: OpenlyMarket is a 'Request-First' marketplace. Instead of scrolling through endless product lists, you post a specific request ('I'm looking for a Netflix account', 'I'm looking for a Python script') and qualified sellers send you tailored offers.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l74.s1: Absolutely yes. We use a strict Escrow system. When you pay, the funds are blocked in a secure account and are only released to the seller after you have confirmed receipt of the product or service.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l78.s1: Can I purchase products from other sites (e.g. Amazon)?
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l83.s1: We support major cryptocurrencies to ensure flexibility and privacy: Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Litecoin (LTC), Monero (XMR) and Tether (USDT).
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l86.s1: What happens if the seller doesn't deliver?
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l87.s1: If the seller does not deliver within the established deadlines or the product is not compliant, you can open a dispute. The funds in Escrow will be frozen and, if we verify non-compliance, you will be refunded 100%.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l93.s1: How do I become a seller?
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l94.s1: To become a seller you must pass a verification process.  A one-time entry fee of $20 is required and, for higher levels, a security deposit (Vendor Bond) to guarantee your reliability.
src.app.faq.FAQClient.l99.s1: The Vendor Bond is a cryptocurrency deposit that remains locked as collateral. It serves to protect buyers from scams or incorrect behavior. If you operate honestly, the funds remain yours.
src.app.faq.layout.l5.s1: OpenlyMarket FAQ for Buyers, Sellers, and Escrow Flows
src.app.faq.layout.l7.s1: Read the OpenlyMarket FAQ to understand escrow protection, seller verification, payments, disputes, and best practices for secure marketplace use.

Escrow for companies, shares, and business assets.
Software licenses, online assets, and digital property.
Release funds only once work is delivered.
Payment method fees shown apply to our platform estimate.
Calculate your exact escrow cost and start with confidence.
Our escrow platform is designed to securely handle a wide range of transactions.
Use escrow for transparent terms, protected funds, and trusted execution.
All communication happens on our platform
Secure messaging between buyer and seller ensures transparency and protection.
To ensure maximum transparency and security, all communication between buyer and seller must take place within the secure chat provided on our platform.
Our escrow system records the entire conversation and transaction process, helping our team verify agreements and resolve potential disputes.
Only conversations that occur inside the platform's secure messaging system are covered by our escrow protection.
Any agreements, instructions, or negotiations that take place outside the platform are not covered by escrow protection.
Every step of the transaction is documented.
Our team can review the entire agreement process.
Buyer and seller always see the same information.
Reduced risk of fraud or misunderstandings.
A portion of our escrow fees contributes to the protection of transactions on the platform.
Our escrow service includes a protection mechanism designed to safeguard transactions conducted through our platform.
A portion of the escrow fees collected is allocated to support operational safeguards and dispute resolution processes.
This helps ensure that transactions are handled securely and that issues can be addressed fairly if they arise.
Helping ensure transaction terms are clear and documented.
Support if disagreements arise between buyer and seller.
Funds are held securely until transaction conditions are met.
Transactions are monitored to reduce fraud risks.
Escrow protection applies only to transactions conducted and documented within the platform, including communications through the official messaging system.
Our goal is to provide a secure and transparent environment where both buyers and sellers can complete transactions with confidence.
Start securely with transparent terms, protected funds, and clear transaction flow.
A simple and secure process designed to protect both buyers and sellers.
Our escrow system ensures that funds are held securely until all transaction conditions are met.
Throughout the entire process, communication between buyer and seller takes place through the platform's secure messaging system.
This ensures transparency and helps protect both parties.
Create an escrow transaction in minutes and protect both sides of the deal.
Why use escrow instead of direct payment?
Escrow protects both buyers and sellers during a transaction.

When transactions happen directly between two parties, there is often a risk that one side may not fulfill the agreement. Escrow helps remove that risk by securely holding the payment until the agreed conditions are completed.
Our escrow platform helps reduce risk for both sides by acting as a neutral and secure intermediary.
Use escrow to ensure a secure and transparent transaction process.
We support a wide range of global and local payment methods for secure escrow transactions.
Available payment options may vary depending on transaction type, region, verification status, and risk review.
EUR, USD, GBP, AUD, CAD, BRL
Recommended for large escrow transactions, international settlements, and business deals.
Supported payment methods may vary depending on transaction size, asset type, jurisdiction, verification status, and internal risk checks.
For maximum transparency and protection, all transaction communication and terms must remain within the platform.
Start your transaction with a supported payment method
Choose the payment option that fits your transaction and complete the process securely through our escrow platform.
Clear tiered pricing with no hidden fee layers at checkout.
Upgrade to dedicated transaction support for complex deals.
Cards, bank transfers, wallets, and crypto across key regions.
The buyer starts the transaction on our platform and defines the terms of the deal, including the transaction amount and delivery conditions.
The buyer sends the payment to our escrow account. The funds are securely held while the transaction progresses.
The seller delivers the agreed product, service, or asset according to the transaction terms.
The buyer confirms that the product or service matches the agreement.
Once the buyer approves the transaction, the escrow system releases the funds to the seller.
Payment is sent directly to the seller
Funds cannot easily be recovered if something goes wrong
Higher risk of fraud or disputes
Funds are securely held until transaction conditions are met
Payment is released only after buyer approval
All communication and terms are documented
Major credit and debit cards are supported for eligible transactions.
Digital wallets may be available depending on the transaction flow and payment region.
Crypto payments may be supported for eligible transactions, subject to asset, network, and compliance review.
See exactly what your transaction will cost before you start. Estimate escrow, processing, and total cost in seconds.
Transparent pricing with immediate calculations and clear fee breakdown.
Set amount, plan, payment method and shipping.
Enter a valid transaction amount to calculate your estimate.
Minimum fee applied for this tier (
Estimated rate shown for guidance. Contact sales for a custom quote.
Final fees may vary based on transaction review and payment network costs.
Authoritative tier structure for standard and concierge escrow.
Built to maximize clarity, trust, and execution speed across every deal size.
For larger deals, custom pricing can be evaluated to align volume, complexity, and support requirements.
EU Card 1.4% + €0.25 / Int Card 2.9% + €0.25 / PayPal 3.49% + €0.35 / Crypto 0.30% / SEPA €1
Built for retention and repeat volume
Lower effective fees as transaction size increases.
Concierge escrow provides additional assistance and transaction management for deals that require more oversight, verification, or coordination between parties.

With Concierge Escrow, our team actively assists in managing the transaction process. This includes coordinating communication between buyer and seller, verifying transaction details, and helping ensure that the deal progresses smoothly from start to completion.
Deals involving large financial amounts or sensitive assets.
Coordination with registrars and ownership verification.
Transactions involving company assets or ownership changes.
Verification, shipping coordination, or inspection support.
Payment, verification, and delivery handled in stages.
Self-service setup · Automated processing · Ideal for straightforward deals · Lower fee
Dedicated assistance · Manual verification · Ideal for complex/high-value deals · Premium fee
Need help with a complex transaction?
Our concierge team can guide you through every step.

Competitor pricing based on publicly available fee structures. Actual fees may vary depending on payment method, transaction type, and additional services.

src.app.privacy.layout.l5.s1: OpenlyMarket Privacy Policy and Data Handling Practices
src.app.privacy.layout.l7.s1: Review the OpenlyMarket privacy policy to understand how data is processed, protected, and used to support secure marketplace operations.
src.app.privacy.page.l107.s1: We only collect username, password (hashata) and data necessary for transactions.
src.app.privacy.page.l125.s1: All sensitive data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We use industrial-grade security standards.
src.app.privacy.page.l135.s1: We do not sell, trade or transfer your data to third parties. Our business model is based on transaction fees, not your data.
src.app.privacy.page.l145.s1: We only use technical cookies that are essential for the functioning of the session. No invasive ad or analytics trackers.
src.app.privacy.page.l157.s1: You have complete control over your data. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting support. Once deleted, the data is irrecoverable.
src.app.privacy.page.l164.s1: Last updated: March 2026. This policy may be subject to change.
src.app.privacy.page.l58.s1: Your privacy is not an option, it is our priority. Find out how we protect your data.
src.app.privacy.page.l84.s1: OpenlyMarket is built on the principle of data minimization. We do not collect information that is not strictly necessary for the operation of the service. We believe that anonymity is a fundamental right, especially in the world of digital transactions.
src.app.privacy.page.l99.s1: We do not ask for ID, passports or selfies. Your real identity remains yours.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l102.s1: We do not ask for ID, passports or selfies. Your real identity remains yours.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l111.s1: We only store the data necessary to complete orders (transaction hashes, encrypted chats). Logs are deleted periodically.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l119.s1: Our servers are located in jurisdictions that respect privacy and are protected by strong encryption.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l127.s1: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel or other invasive trackers. We only use anonymous server-side analytics.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l62.s1: Your privacy is not an option, it is our priority. Find out how we protect your data.
src.app.privacy.PrivacyClient.l88.s1: OpenlyMarket is built on the principle of data minimization. We do not collect information that is not strictly necessary for the operation of the service. We believe that anonymity is a fundamental right, especially in the world of digital transactions.

src.app.refund.page.l115.s1: You may be eligible for a refund under the following circumstances:
src.app.refund.page.l120.s1: The seller failed to deliver the item or service within the agreed timeframe.
src.app.refund.page.l124.s2: The item delivered is significantly different from the seller's description (e.g., different account level, missing features).
src.app.refund.page.l128.s2: The item (e.g., account credentials) does not work upon delivery.
src.app.refund.page.l137.s2: Before completing the order, click 'Report Issue' on the order page.
src.app.refund.page.l138.s2: Resolve directly with the seller (replacement or refund).
src.app.refund.page.l139.s2: If no agreement in 24h, our team steps in.
src.app.refund.page.l140.s2: Funds returned to you if decided in your favor.
src.app.refund.page.l158.s1: Refunds are generally NOT granted in the following cases:
src.app.refund.page.l161.s1: You changed your mind after the item was delivered and verified.
src.app.refund.page.l162.s1: You confirmed the order as "Completed", releasing the funds to the seller.
src.app.refund.page.l163.s1: The issue was caused by your own actions (e.g., getting an account banned for violating game rules after purchase).
src.app.refund.page.l170.s1: Initiating a chargeback with your payment provider without first contacting us may result in the permanent suspension of your OpenlyMarket account. We encourage you to use our dispute resolution process first.
src.app.refund.page.l46.s1: Your purchases are protected. Learn about our Escrow Guarantee and how we handle disputes.

src.app.secure-transaction.layout.l5.s1: How Secure Transactions Work on OpenlyMarket
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l107.s1: A buyer and a seller initiate a transaction on the platform and agree on the terms of the deal.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l118.s1: The buyer sends the payment which is blocked in escrow. At this point the seller can proceed with delivery.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l129.s1: Once delivery is completed, Escrow verifies that the terms of the agreement have been respected.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l140.s1: If everything is correct, the funds are released to the seller and the transaction is completed.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l158.s1: In many cases the escrow is managed directly by OpenlyMarket. This ensures a controlled and secure environment for transactions between users.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l164.s1: Approved professionals who collaborate with the platform. The escrow partners:
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l213.s1: Each transaction has a clear and traceable status to monitor the entire process.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l232.s1: To ensure the security of the marketplace, all transactions must be made via escrow. Any attempt to bypass escrow violates the platform's rules.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l247.s1: Use the escrow system to buy or sell safely on OpenlyMarket.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l62.s1: Your funds are protected until the transaction is completed.
src.app.secure-transaction.page.l88.s1: At OpenlyMarket every transaction is protected via a secure escrow system designed to protect both buyers and sellers. When a deal is initiated, funds are temporarily held in escrow and only released when both parties have completed the terms of the transaction. This ensures that neither party will lose their funds in the process.
src.app.secure-transaction.SecureTransac: The buyer sends the funds to the escrow smart contract. The funds are safe.
The seller sees that the funds are secured and proceeds with the delivery of the service.
Once receipt is confirmed, the funds are released to the seller.
In case of problems, a moderator intervenes to resolve the dispute.
Your funds are protected until the transaction is completed.

At OpenlyMarket every transaction is protected via a secure escrow system designed to protect both buyers and sellers. When a deal is initiated, funds are temporarily held in escrow and only released when both parties have completed the terms of the transaction.

src.app.terms.layout.l5.s1: OpenlyMarket Terms of Service and Platform Rules
src.app.terms.layout.l7.s1: Read the OpenlyMarket terms of service to understand platform usage rules, account responsibilities, transaction obligations, and policy enforcement.
src.app.terms.page.l104.s1: You agree not to list, sell, buy, or request items that violate any applicable laws or our policies. This includes, but is not limited to:
src.app.terms.page.l107.s1: Stolen goods or digital accounts obtained through hacking.
src.app.terms.page.l109.s1: Personal data or information of third parties without consent.
src.app.terms.page.l110.s1: Weapons, drugs, or other regulated substances.
src.app.terms.page.l117.s1: We charge fees for certain services, such as listing fees or transaction fees. These fees are disclosed to you prior to using such services. You are responsible for paying any applicable fees and taxes.
src.app.terms.page.l120.s1: We accept various cryptocurrencies as payment methods. Refunds are processed in accordance with our Refund Policy.
src.app.terms.page.l127.s1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, OpenlyMarket shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues, whether incurred directly or indirectly.
src.app.terms.page.l134.s1: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of any material changes by posting the new Terms on the Site. Your continued use of the Services after the effective date of the revised Terms constitutes your acceptance of the terms.
src.app.terms.page.l141.s1: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at
src.app.terms.page.l46.s1: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform. They govern your relationship with OpenlyMarket.
src.app.terms.page.l72.s1: Welcome to OpenlyMarket ("we," "our," or "us"). By accessing or using our website, services, or applications (collectively, the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use our Services.
src.app.terms.page.l79.s1: To access certain features of the Services, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
src.app.terms.page.l82.s1: You must be at least 18 years old to use our Services.
src.app.terms.page.l83.s1: You may not use the Services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
src.app.terms.page.l84.s1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our sole discretion.
src.app.terms.page.l91.s1: OpenlyMarket acts as a venue to allow users who comply with our policies to offer, sell, and buy certain goods and services. We are not a party to the actual transaction between buyers and sellers.
src.app.terms.page.l96.s1: All payments are held in escrow until the buyer confirms receipt of the goods or services, or until a specified time period has elapsed. This ensures the safety of both parties.
src.app.terms.TermsClient.l49.s1: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform. They govern your relationship with OpenlyMarket.
src.app.terms.TermsClient.l75.s1: Welcome to OpenlyMarket ("we," "our," or "us"). By accessing or using our website, services, or applications (collectively, the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use our Services.
src.app.terms.TermsClient.l82.s1: To access certain features of the Services, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
src.app.terms.TermsClient.l85.s1: You must be at least 18 years old to use our Services.
src.app.terms.TermsClient.l86.s1: You may not use the Services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.

src.components.onboarding.StepPayout.l95: Payments are handled through a secure middleman flow (escrow). The buyer funds the deal, we hold the funds, then release to you when the deal is completed. A platform fee (2.5%) is applied.
